basics.name: Briana Lee
basics.label: Student
basics.summary: I am studying for a B.S. in Computer Science in the Department of Information and Computer Sciences at the University of Hawaii. I expect to graduate in Spring, 2025.

courses: Introduction to Java I & II, C++, Calculus I & II, Algorithms, Machine-Lvl & Systems Programming, Software Engineering I & II

Duties include learning and using Docker for the iCOSMOS Swarm Tools, updating the Cosmos Docs website, and data collection for an ongoing project.

Created comprehensive data visualizations and dashboards that provided clear and actionable insights.
